tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Standard Tuning EADGBe

The A chord is only played briefly as a transition chord.
The whole song is one progression.
Ad lib the outro.

[Intro]
[ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Let me lay it on the line, I got a little freakiness inside[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
And you know that the man has got to deal with it...[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I don't care what they say, I'm not about to pay nobody's way[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz it's all about the dog in me, oohh...[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
I want to freak in the morning, a freak in the evening, just like me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I need a roughneck brother that can satisfy me, just for me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
If you are that kind of man, cuz I'm that kind of girl[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
I got a freaky secret, everybody sing, cuz we don't give a damn about a thing[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Cuz I will be a freak until the day, until the dawn[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
And we can (pump, pump!) all through the night, till the early morn[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Come on and I will take you around the hood on a gangsta lean[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz we can (pump, pump!) any time of day, it's all good for me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Boy, you're moving kind of slow, you got to keep it up now there ya go[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
There's just one thing that a man must do...oohh[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I'm packing all the flavor you need, I got you shook up on your knees[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz it's all about the dog in meeeee![/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
I want to freak in the morning, a freak in the evening, just like me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I need a roughneck brother that can satisfy me, just for me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
If you are that kind of man, cuz I'm that kind of girl[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
I got a freaky secret, everybody sing, cuz we don't give a damn about a thing[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Cuz I will be a freak until the day, until the dawn[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
And we can (pump, pump!) all through the night, till the early morn[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Come on and I will take you around the hood on a gangsta lean[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Cuz we can (pump, pump!) any time of day, it's all good for me[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Cuz I will be a freak until the day, until the dawn[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
And we can (pump, pump!) all through the night, till the early morn[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Come on and I will take you around the hood on a gangsta lean[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
Cuz we can (pump, pump!) any time of day, it's all good for me...[/tab]
